Romantic nationalism is a paradigm on [[nationalism]] inspired by [[romanticism]].

It values the idea of gaining transcendence through emotions over rationality as with other forms of romanticism. In its case it is especially about feelings about your country, while other strains like [[romance]] focus on different areas<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Noc1OH0CUBc&list=PLND1JCRq8Vuh3f0P5qjrSdb5eC1ZfZwWJ&index=25</ref>.

The alternative to Romantic nationalism is [[Sangha democracy]]

== References ==

[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Romantic nationalism]][[sn:Romantic nationalism]][[Category:Romanticism]]
[[Category:Git synced pages']]
[[sn:Romantic nationalism]]
[[Category:Pages]]
